title: helichrysum kraussii
intro: Helichrysum kraussii, also known as the 'kransbill', is a species of flowering plant within the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum kraussii lie in its high concentration of flavonoids, essential oils, and phenolic acids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Helichrysum kraussii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
